termination_reason: As part of the organizational restructuring announced on February 3, 2026, the Regional Sales Manager position for the Western Region is being eliminated. This decision is not a reflection of your individual performance.
vacation_payout: $6,923.08 (18 accrued days at current daily rate)
severance_details: 12 weeks of base salary ($27,692.31 gross), payable in a lump sum on March 31, 2026, contingent upon execution of the enclosed Separation and Release Agreement within 21 days.
benefits_continuation: Medical, dental, and vision coverage will continue through April 30, 2026. You are eligible for COBRA continuation coverage for up to 18 months following that date. COBRA election materials will be mailed to your home address within 14 days of your termination date. Your 401(k) account remains yours; contact Fidelity Investments at 800-343-3548 for rollover options.
property_to_return:
1. Company-issued laptop (Dell Latitude 5540, asset tag CP-L-2847)
2. Building access badge and parking pass
3. Company credit card (ending 4491)
4. Client files and any printed confidential materials
5. Company mobile phone (if applicable)
post_employment_obligations: Please be reminded that the Confidentiality and Non-Solicitation Agreement executed on June 15, 2021 remains in effect for 12 months following your termination date. You are prohibited from soliciting Cedarpoint clients or employees during this period. All proprietary information must remain confidential indefinitely.
